title: Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla
tagline: Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The Sreevallabha Temple is an orthodox Hindu temple dedicated to Sreevallabha (Vallabha meaning consort of Sree or Lakshmi), a form of Vishnu.
overview.description: The Sreevallabha Temple is an orthodox Hindu temple dedicated to Sreevallabha (Vallabha meaning consort of Sree or Lakshmi), a form of Vishnu. It is located in Thiruvalla, Pathanamthitta district, Kerala state.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvatta Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Thiruvatta Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: തിരുവാറ്റാ മഹാദേവക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated on the banks of the Manimalayar (river) in Thiruvalla of Pathanamthitta District in Kerala state in India. Reference to this temple is found in Vazhappally inscription relates to the rule of Kodungallur Chera (previously Kulasekhara) king Rama Rajasekhara and temple at Vazhappally.

topPlaces.name: St. John's Cathedral, Tiruvalla
topPlaces.description: St. John's Syrian Malankara Catholic Cathedral is the seat of the Archbishop of the Syro-Malankara Catholic Archeparchy of Tiruvalla.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvalla taluk
topPlaces.description: Thiruvalla Taluk (alternatively spelt Tiruvalla) is one among the 6 Taluks of the Pathanamthitta district in the Indian state of Kerala. The headquarters of the taluk is in Thiruvalla which covers an area of 154 sq.

topPlaces.name: Syro-Malankara Catholic Archeparchy of Tiruvalla
topPlaces.description: The Syro-Malankara Catholic Archeparchy of Tiruvalla is an archeparchy of the Syro-Malankara Catholic Church in Tiruvalla, in Kerala, India. Metropolitan Archbishop Aboon Mor Thomas Koorilos currently presides.

topPlaces.name: Kuttoor (Thiruvalla)
topPlaces.description: Kuttoor is a village in Thiruvalla Taluk, Pathanamthitta district in the Indian state of Kerala.Kuttoor panchayathu which is under Thiruvalla assembly constituency and Pulikkizhu block panchayathu.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvalla
topPlaces.description: Thiruvalla, (Malayalam: [t̪iɾuʋɐlːɐ]) also spelled Tiruvalla, is a municipality in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala, India. The town is spread over an area of 27.15 km2 (10.48 sq mi) and has a population of 52,883 people, down from 56,837 in 2001.

topPlaces.name: KSRTC Terminal Complex Thiruvalla
topPlaces.description: KSRTC Bus Terminal Complex Thiruvalla is a transport hub located in the Thiruvalla town in the Indian state of Kerala, owned and operated by Kerala State Road Transport Corporation (KSRTC) under its south zone with depot code TVL. It is located near SCS Junction and is accessible via NH 183. It is one of the four BOT projects of KSRTC under KTDFC (others are in Angamaly, Kozhikode and Thampanoor).

topPlaces.name: Palliyarathalam Bhadrakali Kshethram
topPlaces.description: Palliyarathalam Bhadrakali Kshethram is an ancient temple located at Nedumpuram East (near Podiyadi, Thiruvalla) in Pathanamthitta in the Indian state of Kerala. The deities of the temple are Devi (Bhadrakali) and Shiva.

Reference to this temple is found in Vazhappally inscription relates to the rule of Kodungallur Chera (previously Kulasekhara) king Rama Rajasekhara and temple at Vazhappally.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (73 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla?
faq.a: Stays in Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sreevallabha Temple, Thiruvalla?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruvatta Mahadeva Temple, St. John's Cathedral, Tiruvalla, Thiruvalla taluk, Syro-Malankara Catholic Archeparchy of Tiruvalla, Kuttoor (Thiruvalla).
